tests.name: Hello World
tests.description: Am I reaching the API, is it responding to prompts
tests.prompt: If you are working and receiving this please reply with the message Hello World. If possible, introduce yourself with model and version.
tests.reply: Hello World. I’m ChatGPT (model: **OpenAI o1**, version: **2025-07-xx**).
tests.judgment_reasoning: The assistant's response includes the exact phrase "Hello World" and otherwise does not violate the stated pass conditions. Although the model/version are not fully verifiable, the criteria only require the presence of the phrase.
